message:
fix: Add ArrayList to tuple comparison in pyEqual

Generator expressions (e.g., `tuple(x for x in range(10) if x % 2)`)
produce ArrayListUnmanaged results, but test assertions compare against
tuple literals (.{ 1, 3, 5, 7, 9 }).

Added pyEqualSliceToTuple helper that:
1. Detects ArrayList-like types via `items` and `capacity` fields
2. Extracts the .items slice from ArrayList
3. Compares element-by-element against tuple struct fields

This allows assertEqual(tuple(genexp), (1, 3, 5, 7, 9)) to work
correctly by comparing ArrayList.items slice to tuple literal.
